title: StockNet
description: A real-time financial market analyzer leveraging deep learning to predict volatility in high-frequency trading environments. Architected with high-throughput data pipelines and sub-millisecond inference.

title: EventOps
description: Scalable event-driven orchestration layer for enterprise logistics. Processes millions of telemetry events per second with guaranteed delivery and dynamic resource scaling in multi-cloud environments.

title: OCR Pipeline
description: Automated document intelligence engine that transforms unstructured legal documents into structured data clusters. Utilizing custom OCR models and NLP for entity recognition and relationship mapping.
